title: Data Recovery & Encrypted Backup Solutions
headline: Recover lost files—or make sure you never lose them again.
description: Professional data recovery and encrypted backup solutions for individuals and small businesses, helping recover lost files and protect critical data across Ocala, Belleview, The Villages, and surrounding Florida communities.

sections.heading: Did You Know?
paragraph: Over 90 percent of individuals and small businesses do not have a reliable, recent backup of their data.
Storage devices can fail suddenly due to age, firmware issues, electrical damage, or overheating, often without warning.
With a properly configured encrypted backup, recovery from accidental deletion, hardware failure, or ransomware is fast and stress-free.

sections.heading: What We Do
paragraph: We recover lost or inaccessible data and design long-term backup strategies that prevent future loss, giving you confidence that your files are protected.
items: Recover deleted, corrupted, or inaccessible files from hard drives, SSDs, and USB devices
Assess storage devices for failure risks before complete data loss occurs
Configure encrypted, automated backup systems that run quietly in the background
Migrate data securely between computers, operating systems, or storage platforms
Design backup strategies with both local and offsite protection
Use trusted, privacy-respecting tools that keep you in full control of your data

sections.heading: How It Works
paragraph: We begin with a no-risk assessment to determine whether recovery is possible without sending your device to a data lab.
If recovery is feasible, we retrieve and verify your data using proven tools and transparent methods.
Once recovery is complete, we help you implement a secure backup solution to protect your data going forward—without subscriptions or hidden fees.
